scoutingRows.Notes: Very fast robot with a very fast climb
Moved in a semicircle the entire time .
Drives slow in auto, tele driving slightly faster
Seemed to be having issues then disabled halfway through
Robot died mid match the safety lights turned off
Issues connecting to fms b4 match, arm very wiggly
Got stuck on a piece of algae
Doesn't score mainly removes algae, stopped moving
Can only do level 4 very slow
Really fast good driver and can do all levels and
Slow but stays out of the way nicely
Very bad ane slow can't do really anything
Mostly scored algae in the proccesir
Auto seemed to fail, arm is unstable
L4 issues for first half of match
Incredibly slow movement, took forever to score
Dead. Brief moment of movement at beginning.
Coral got stuck several times, only working bot
Does not hold coral very securely
Floor algae bot but cannot intake
Hard to scout 5000 hammer heads all at once
Problems came from poor robot, rather than drivers
Went for algae at first, then went for low l coral
Slow elevator auto was close to l4
Very little defense, just mingled around
Very slow robot, missed coral a lot
Auto ran into the wall and a stopped
Coral stuck in arm, went defense
Arm was shaky, pretty good defense
Seems like drive issues. Just drove around
No way of intaking coral from what I see
Very accurate bot, Lil tipsy at times
Good algae dislodge and good l4 coral
Lost coral. Was slow. Had a hard time lining up
Robot kept pausing for long periods of time.
Couldn't score coral. Got stuck on algea
VERY swingy and unstable arm, slow driving, bad team
Auto missed coral. Fast l4 scoring
Good algae but inaccurate arm mechanism
Spinning a lot and got coral stuck in machine
Knocked the cages around. Did nothing
Went for algae many times, but picked up none.

scoutingRows.Notes: Very good dou le mechanism with the coral and alge
Unreliable coral pickup, and meh score speed
Either their robot broke our drivers are bad
Not very good at scoring algae, low success rate
Tipped over at the beginning of game
Went straight to park when game started
Missed every coral. Played defense well
Reliable scoring, semi slow but good
RSL looked like it was browning out
Something knocked them off their path
Missed picking up algea, then broke
Slow elevator. Some fighting over funnel.
Bot stopped working after like 20 seconds,powered onagainafterandkeptplaying
Instead of shooting coral it launched it over
Played defense first half, went to score after
Is able to shoot barge algae
Good part of the match there were connection issueonlycontrollingalgae
Very shaky  and a little bit slow elevator.
Scored a lot, pretty L4 focused, had the ability toscorelowerlevels
Wasn't able to see for a few seconds.
Went for reef rp then went for filling up the reef
Could've done better but human player was awful, brokindasabatogedredteam
Bad mechanism for coral but good defense
Coral stuvk between funnel and arm
Extremely shaky arm. Coral stuck twice between fun
Crossed through blue barge. Coral stuck in bot.
Was slow and a bit tippy towards the end
Tech foul in auto, bumped into barge
Good at picking up coral on the ground

Seemed to have issues with the mechanism
Good against being defended, last second climb
Decent defense, but seemed to have browned out?
Super slow only scored in processer
Not great driving, got stuck on algae
Scoring is decent but loading is awful
Caught on some algae for a few seconds
Quick cycles, looked like connection issues forbit
Some connection issues, couldn't dislodge algae
Kind mid defense blocked one side bots went to oth
Got good defense played on them, blocked a lot
Slow elev movement, good algae bot
Possibly some connection issues, can't move coral
Ran out of time for deep climb.
Got stuck on algae twice, focused on L4 not RP
Looked like they played a different game
Slow. Parked at opposing coral station for duratio
Fast cycles completed RP then did L4

Remove algae not score, did L4 nor RP
Algae got stuck for a bit
L4 elevator sometimes goes too high

Spent whole time shifting under their cage
Takes a while to line up to score l4
Fast cycles times but heavily defended

pitRows.What can the robot do in auto?: Taxi and score more than 1 game piece from a variety of locations
pitRows.How does the robot acquire algae?: Can pull algae out of reef and can pick up algae off of the floor
pitRows.What can the robot do in end game?: Robot can climb on the deep cage

pitRows.How does the robot acquire algae?: Can pull algae out of reef
pitRows.What can the robot do in end game?: Robot has no climbing ability and can park
